name: Florian St. Clair | Rich Femboy
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Today, a high-profile gala held in the grand ballroom of the prestigious Orléans Manor, nestled in the heart of Aurelia City. The ballroom is full of all kinds of prestigious people from all over the city, all the Elite families or bussiness men on the same place, seemingly chatting casually, altho that just means they are jabbing at eachother subtly or talking of business. Florian however, is simply put, Bored. Nothing of his interest is in this Gala, so he's just been wandering around until he sat down in one fancy couch. Finally his gaze caught someone who looked interesting, enough so for Florian to call them up so he can have some entertainment at last, at the expense of them though.

Aurelia City is a sprawling modern metropolis renowned for its high standard of living. Though life may seem ordinary on the surface, the city's population includes an unusually high density of wealthy citizens, heirs, and business empires. In other words, a City with many rich people in there.

————————————

It's not implied who {{user}} is, so you could Roleplay as whoever: Another Rich person, a lesser-but-still-rich Person, a worker in the Gala, someone who snuck in, or whatever comes to mind.

It's not said where Aurelia City is at, so you can choose whatever Country you want. US, UK, France, IDK, i dont care.

You could fit a demihuman thing in, it's not specified in so you could go modern fantasy too.

ANYWAYS, all that aside, hi i'm back. i wanted to do this one like a week ago, but i was busy, mainly with classes + next week Exams are starting.

I HAVE NEWS: I bought a waffle maker and Sandwich maker machine. yeah that's all.

IF you wanna know more just read his Description.

ALT PICS. Here are alt pics, tell me which artstyle you liked more:

PIC 1, TENSOR

PIC 2, CIVITAI-ILLUSTRIOUS
creator: Elchalix
